title: Balaji
actors: Seeta Rama Anjaneyulu Chilakalapudi, Shanta Kumari, Rajeshwari Devi
plot: A mythological about the deity at Tirupati, notorious as India's richest temple shrine. The film featured Pulliah's wife as the consort of 'Lord of the Seven Hills', Venkateswara. The film depicts the life of Shri Venkateswara one...
